title: Origin Shielding
description: Architect origin shielding solutions to protect backend servers from excessive requests. Implement a secondary caching layer to absorb "Thundering Herd" events during cache expirations. Evaluate the benefits of origin shielding for origin server stability and performance.
objectives: Architect origin shielding solutions to protect backend servers from excessive requests.
Implement a secondary caching layer to absorb "Thundering Herd" events during cache expirations.
Evaluate the benefits of origin shielding for origin server stability and performance.
